who: law firm billing administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For law firm billing administrators processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient extraction causes cash flow gaps. We streamline formatting instead of manual data entry.
problem: Inefficient extraction and formatting of legal billing timesheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm billing admins with demo video
Community forums where billing admins share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry and formatting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
